name: multi-tenant-content-generation
description: Standalone Codex plugin for multi-tenant brand normalization and premium content-generation workflows, starting with LinkedIn infographic production.

interface.longDescription: Package reusable Codex skills for tenant-local brand normalization and premium content-production workflows. Version one includes normalize-brand and generate-infographic, with the plugin designed to grow into a broader content-generation umbrella.
defaultPrompt: Normalize this tenant folder into a reusable approved-ready brand profile
Generate a premium LinkedIn infographic using this tenant folder and source text
Use the content-generation plugin to normalize brand state before visual production
